hero.title: About PVCON
hero.subtitle: A premier global provider of independent GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, and Professional Training services, supporting pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations across 60+ countries.

images.aboutAlt: PVCON pharmacovigilance consulting team in a professional setting
images.teamAlt: PVCON consultants collaborating on regulatory strategy

story.p1: PVCON is a premier global provider of independent GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, and Professional Training services, supporting pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations across 60+ countries.
story.p2: Recognized for its integrity, independence, and technical excellence, PVCON serves as a trusted "One-Stop Partner" for comprehensive Pharmacovigilance Audit and Quality solutions, helping clients navigate complex regulatory landscapes with confidence.
story.p3: PVCON was founded by globally respected Pharmacovigilance expert Moin Don, Executive Director, whose leadership and deep industry expertise have shaped the organization into a reliable strategic partner for companies seeking compliance excellence and inspection readiness.

approach.heading: A Strategic Compliance Partner
approach.p1: PVCON is more than a service provider — we are a strategic compliance partner. We do not simply support pharmacovigilance activities; we architect robust, regulator-confident PV systems that drive patient safety, operational excellence, and long-term compliance sustainability.
approach.p2: We deploy robust audit frameworks, comprehensive training programs, and proactive compliance strategies aligned with current ICH, EU GVP, and global GxP guidelines. Our consultants work as embedded partners within your teams, transferring knowledge and building sustainable internal capabilities.
approach.p3: From pharmacovigilance system setup and PSMF creation to vendor qualification and regulatory inspection readiness, we provide end-to-end support designed to elevate the safety, quality, and regulatory integrity of your operations.

intro.p1: In an increasingly complex and highly regulated GxP landscape, compliance is not just about meeting requirements — it is about building resilient systems that protect patients, safeguard brands, and withstand regulatory scrutiny. PVCON is designed to be your strategic partner in achieving operational excellence, inspection confidence, and sustainable compliance maturity.
intro.p2: We combine deep pharmacovigilance expertise, regulatory intelligence, audit proficiency, and practical implementation experience to deliver solutions that are not theoretical but operational, scalable, and regulator-ready.

01.title: Forward-Looking Regulatory Intelligence
01.description: Proactive monitoring of evolving global PV regulations to keep you future-ready. We track shifts across EMA, FDA, MHRA, PMDA, and emerging markets — translating complex regulatory changes into actionable compliance strategies before they impact your operations.

02.title: Integrated End-to-End PV Ecosystem
02.description: Comprehensive PV solutions spanning operations, audits, governance, inspection readiness, and training. Our integrated model ensures every element of your pharmacovigilance system works in concert — from ICSR processing and signal management to PSMF maintenance and training.

03.title: Risk-Based, Inspection-Ready Approach
03.description: Compliance strategies built for audit resilience and regulator confidence. We design risk-based frameworks that prioritize critical compliance areas, prepare teams through mock inspections, and establish CAPA processes demonstrating sustained regulatory commitment.

04.title: Best in Class Auditors & Consultants
04.description: 200+ man-years of experience with leading pharma companies and PV providers. Auditors with MHRA, EMA, DCGI, and Infarmed regulatory experience. Advisors to India's Drug Controller General (PvPI) and speakers at DIA, RQA, UMC — multilingual consultants positioned globally.

expertise.heading: Areas of Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Our consultants possess deep, hands-on experience across the full spectrum of pharmacovigilance and GxP disciplines.

qppv.title: QPPV Services
qppv.desc: EU-qualified QPPVs ensuring full compliance with pharmacovigilance legislation, adverse event oversight, and regulatory liaison.

gxp.title: GxP Auditing
gxp.desc: Comprehensive GCP, GLP, GMP, GCLP, and vendor qualification audits delivered on-site and remotely across global locations.

psmf.title: PSMF Management
psmf.desc: End-to-end Pharmacovigilance System Master File creation, maintenance, and regulatory alignment.

inspection.title: Inspection Readiness
inspection.desc: Mock inspections, gap analyses, and structured CAPA plans mirroring EMA, MHRA, and FDA inspection approaches.

signal.title: Signal Detection
signal.desc: Robust signal management frameworks, benefit-risk assessment support, and periodic safety report preparation.

regulatory.title: Regulatory Compliance
regulatory.desc: Strategic guidance across EU GVP, ICH, FDA 21 CFR, and WHO standards covering 20+ regulatory jurisdictions.

cta.heading: Ready to Strengthen Your PV Operations?
cta.text: Partner with PVCON for expert pharmacovigilance consulting, GxP auditing, and regulatory compliance support.
